creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
So this was MFCed to stable/13 and I've rebuild at 
13.0-STABLE #1 n246608-efe3bf0fb092: Fri Jul 30 18:59:02 CEST 2021

but I still get an endless stream of messages after a while, potentially related to plugging and unplugging devices and hubs.

% dmesg|tail
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 4 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 1 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 2 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 3 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 4 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 1 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 2 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 3 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 4 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb
uhub_reattach_port: giving up port 1 reset - device vanished: change 0xfb status 0x7fb


Is this supposed to fully work on stable/13 or am I running into a different issue here?
